rules.name: styling-no-hardcoded-colors
rules.evidence: Styling — Tailwind only, semantic tokens (`bg-muted`, `text-foreground-light`), no hardcoded colors.

rules.name: studio-shortcut-registry
rules.evidence: Prefer registered, discoverable shortcuts over one-off keyboard listeners; keep `G then ...` chords for navigation.

uncompilable: Language — Use U.S. English everywhere (tone/general guidance, not tied to a specific action).
Studio — Co-locate sub-components with parent (file-placement guidance, not expressible as a content/path regex trigger).
UI — import from 'ui', use `_Shadcn_` suffixed variants for form primitives (correct-vs-incorrect variant usage can't be distinguished by a simple regex).
